title: DEO Raigarh Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 46 Lab Assistant, Teacher and More Posts
short_info: The District Education Office Raigarh (DEO Raigarh) has published the Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 2541/CGES/Contract Recruitment/2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 46 Teaching and Non-Teaching positions. Candidates aged between 21 and 35 years and holding Graduate or Post Graduate degrees with minimum 45% marks or second class, along with B.Ed/D.Ed/D.El.Ed as applicable, TET qualification (Primary or Upper Primary level as per post), and English medium education from Class 6 to Post Graduation (except for Hindi/Sanskrit Lecturer posts) are

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (non-creamy layer): 5 years; Women: 10 years; PWD: as per GAD instructions; Chhattisgarh residents: additional 5 years (maximum age 40 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate with minimum 45% or second class marks and B.Ed/D.Ed/D.El.Ed as applicable, TET qualified (Primary or Upper Primary level as per post), Entire education from Class 6th to Post Graduation in English medium (except Hindi/Sanskrit Lecturer posts)
qualification.details: Principal Primary Section: Graduate with minimum 45% marks and D.Ed/D.El.Ed, TET Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Lab Assistant: Higher Secondary with Biology/Math group from recognized board, entire education in English medium. Teacher English: Graduate with minimum 45% marks and B.Ed, English as one subject at graduation, TET Upper Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Teacher Math: Graduate with minimum 45% marks and B.Ed, Math with any two subjects from Physics/Chemistry/Electronics/Computer Science/Statistics/Military Science/Geology at graduation, TET Upper Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Lecturer Sanskrit: Post Graduate in Sanskrit/Classics/Acharya with minimum second class and B.Ed. Assistant Teacher: Higher Secondary with minimum 45% marks and D.Ed/D.El.Ed, TET Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Lecturer Hindi: Post Graduate in relevant subject with minimum second class and B.Ed. Principal Secondary School: Post Graduate with minimum second class and B.Ed, TET Upper Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Teacher Science: Graduate with minimum 45% marks and B.Ed, Science with any two subjects from Chemistry/Botany/Zoology/Military Science/Geology at graduation, TET Upper Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Library Assistant: Graduate with second class and B.Lib from recognized university, preference to English medium. Physical Education Teacher: Higher Secondary and D.P.Ed or B.P.Ed with Graduate, entire education in English medium. Lecturer Math: Post Graduate in Math/Applied Math with minimum second class and B.Ed, entire education in English medium. Teacher Art: Graduate with minimum 45% marks and B.Ed, Social Science with at least one subject from History/Geography/Economics/Political Science at graduation, TET Upper Primary level qualified, entire education in English medium. Lab Assistant (Science): Higher Secondary with Biology/Math group from recognized board, entire education in English medium. Lecturer Chemistry/Biochemistry: Post Graduate in Chemistry/Biochemistry with minimum second class and B.Ed, entire education in English medium.

selection_process: Merit List based on marks in educational qualifications Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DEO Raigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DEO Raigarh to complete the application.
